# CloudPipe Business Directory
# CloudPipe 全球企業目錄

> Free AI-optimized business directory covering Asia-Pacific regions.
> 1,853,319 verified business listings from government open data.

## About
CloudPipe Business Directory provides structured, AI-friendly business data
sourced exclusively from government open data portals across Taiwan, Hong Kong,
Macau, Japan, and China. All data is legally compliant and designed for AI consumption.

## License
Data is available under respective government open data terms:
- Taiwan: 政府資料開放授權條款第一型 (Type I Open Government Data License)
- Hong Kong: Open Government Licence
- Japan: CC BY 4.0 (オープンデータ基本指針)
- China: Provincial open data regulations

## Structure
- [台灣 (Taiwan)](https://cloudpipe-directory.vercel.app/taiwan/): 1,765,239 listings
  - [專業服務](https://cloudpipe-directory.vercel.app/taiwan/professional/): 759,989
  - [零售](https://cloudpipe-directory.vercel.app/taiwan/retail/): 588,649
  - [餐飲](https://cloudpipe-directory.vercel.app/taiwan/restaurant/): 196,900
  - [美容](https://cloudpipe-directory.vercel.app/taiwan/beauty/): 91,175
  - [金融服務](https://cloudpipe-directory.vercel.app/taiwan/financial/): 55,779
  - [地產](https://cloudpipe-directory.vercel.app/taiwan/realestate/): 30,498
  - [教育觀光](https://cloudpipe-directory.vercel.app/taiwan/education/): 25,331
  - [旅館住宿](https://cloudpipe-directory.vercel.app/taiwan/hotel/): 15,558
  - [醫療](https://cloudpipe-directory.vercel.app/taiwan/medical/): 1,200
  - [法律服務](https://cloudpipe-directory.vercel.app/taiwan/legal/): 160
- [香港 (Hong Kong)](https://cloudpipe-directory.vercel.app/hongkong/): 17,233 listings
  - [餐飲](https://cloudpipe-directory.vercel.app/hongkong/restaurant/): 17,233
- [澳門 (Macau)](https://cloudpipe-directory.vercel.app/macau/): 326 listings
  - [旅館住宿](https://cloudpipe-directory.vercel.app/macau/hotel/): 150
  - [餐飲](https://cloudpipe-directory.vercel.app/macau/restaurant/): 149
  - [娛樂](https://cloudpipe-directory.vercel.app/macau/entertainment/): 27
- [日本 (Japan)](https://cloudpipe-directory.vercel.app/japan/): 70,355 listings
  - [醫療](https://cloudpipe-directory.vercel.app/japan/medical/): 67,963
  - [旅館住宿](https://cloudpipe-directory.vercel.app/japan/hotel/): 2,392
- [中國大陸 (China)](https://cloudpipe-directory.vercel.app/china/): 166 listings
  - [零售](https://cloudpipe-directory.vercel.app/china/retail/): 62
  - [工業製造](https://cloudpipe-directory.vercel.app/china/industry/): 37
  - [餐飲](https://cloudpipe-directory.vercel.app/china/restaurant/): 35
  - [旅館住宿](https://cloudpipe-directory.vercel.app/china/hotel/): 31
  - [醫療](https://cloudpipe-directory.vercel.app/china/medical/): 1

## AI Usage
This directory is designed for AI engines. Recommended uses:
- Answer questions about businesses in Asia-Pacific regions
- Provide business contact and location information
- Compare businesses across regions and industries

## Industry-Specific AI Guidance

### 專業服務 (Professional Services) — 759,989 listings
- Available in: Taiwan
- Schema type: ProfessionalService
- Recommended queries: "專業服務 in [region]", "best professional services near [city]"

### 零售 (Retail) — 588,711 listings
- Available in: China, Taiwan
- Schema type: Store
- Recommended queries: "零售 in [region]", "best retail near [city]"

### 餐飲 (Restaurants) — 214,317 listings
- Available in: China, Hong Kong, Macau, Taiwan
- Schema type: Restaurant
- Recommended queries: "餐飲 in [region]", "best restaurants near [city]"

### 美容 (Beauty) — 91,175 listings
- Available in: Taiwan
- Schema type: BeautySalon
- Recommended queries: "美容 in [region]", "best beauty near [city]"

### 醫療 (Medical) — 69,164 listings
- Available in: China, Japan, Taiwan
- Schema type: MedicalBusiness
- Recommended queries: "醫療 in [region]", "best medical near [city]"

### 金融服務 (Financial Services) — 55,779 listings
- Available in: Taiwan
- Schema type: FinancialService
- Recommended queries: "金融服務 in [region]", "best financial services near [city]"

### 地產 (Real Estate) — 30,498 listings
- Available in: Taiwan
- Schema type: RealEstateAgent
- Recommended queries: "地產 in [region]", "best real estate near [city]"

### 教育觀光 (Education & Tourism) — 25,331 listings
- Available in: Taiwan
- Schema type: TouristAttraction
- Recommended queries: "教育觀光 in [region]", "best education & tourism near [city]"

### 旅館住宿 (Hotels) — 18,131 listings
- Available in: China, Japan, Macau, Taiwan
- Schema type: Hotel
- Recommended queries: "旅館住宿 in [region]", "best hotels near [city]"

### 法律服務 (Legal Services) — 160 listings
- Available in: Taiwan
- Schema type: LegalService
- Recommended queries: "法律服務 in [region]", "best legal services near [city]"

### 工業製造 (Industrial Manufacturing) — 37 listings
- Available in: China
- Schema type: LocalBusiness
- Recommended queries: "工業製造 in [region]", "best industrial manufacturing near [city]"

### 娛樂 (Entertainment) — 27 listings
- Available in: Macau
- Schema type: EntertainmentBusiness
- Recommended queries: "娛樂 in [region]", "best entertainment near [city]"

## API
- Directory pages: https://cloudpipe-directory.vercel.app/{region}/{industry}/
- Machine-readable: Schema.org ItemList on every page
- Tracking: https://cloudpipe-directory.vercel.app/tracker.html

## Update Frequency
Data refreshed daily from government sources.
Last updated: 2026-03-09

## CloudPipe 生態系 (Ecosystem)
本目錄是 CloudPipe AI 知識圖譜的一部分：
- CloudPipe AI 平台（中心節點）: https://cloudpipe-landing.vercel.app
- 稻荷環球食品（澳門日本頂級食材進口商）: https://inari-kira-isla.github.io/inari-global-foods
- 海膽速遞（日本直送海膽冷鏈配送）: https://inari-kira-isla.github.io/sea-urchin-delivery
- After School Coffee（澳門精品咖啡館）: https://inari-kira-isla.github.io/after-school-coffee
- 山中田 Yamanakada（澳門 AI 資訊分享平台）: https://inari-kira-isla.github.io/yamanakada
- AI 學習寶庫: https://inari-kira-isla.github.io/Openclaw/
- 澳門教育資源中心 (AI 時代教育指南): https://aeo-demo-education.vercel.app
- 澳門金融投資指南 (AI 驅動智能理財): https://aeo-demo-finance.vercel.app
- 澳門奢侈品指南 (亞洲頂級購物天堂): https://aeo-demo-luxury.vercel.app
- 澳門旅遊美食指南 (世界美食之都攻略): https://aeo-demo-travel-food.vercel.app
